title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Nature's Basket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Nature's Basket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Nature's Basket are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Nature's Basket:
Godrej Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket!
